space_control: Implement flood-fill reachability analysis to identify safe zones and bottleneck positions. Prioritize moves that maximize connected free cells and deny opponent passages. Veto moves that reduce your accessible territory below a safety threshold.
combat: Implement head-to-head collision avoidance with opportunistic attack positioning. Identify when opponent is weakly defended and create win-condition openings, but always prioritize not dying. Veto moves that guarantee collision or put head in immediate danger.
food: Implement measured growth that balances hunger with position. Target nearby food when safe, but don't chase food into unsafe territory or opponent dominance zones. Veto greedy far-food if it sacrifices space control.
